questionHtml:
Jose concludes from this data that countries with high happiness scores are likely to be favourite expatriate countries.

State, with a reason, whether Jose’s conclusion is appropriate.
markschemeHtml:
Because rs is too close to zero and hence Jose’s conclusion is not appropriate          R1


Note: Award R1 for a comment on the value rs and “not appropriate” as a conclusion.
Accept "rs indicates a weak correlation of the ranks".
Do not accept "rs indicates a weak correlation of happiness score and country rank”.

[1 mark]

meta.title: State, with a reason, whether Jose’s conclusion is appropriate.
